n: Book 1, Chapter 10: On the Precipice of Danger

steps.t: Meneldir is at the camp of Idhobel, in Western Eregion.
Meneldir has recommended that you return to Skardí Bendblade's blacksmith shop in Mossward so you can restock and resupply for your journey north to M…
Skardí Bendblade stands behind the counter of his blacksmith shop in Mossward.
